data.content: Implemented review-skill write constraints: review stages now explicitly prohibit code edits and git write operations, allow only knot metadata writes, and require reject/failure-path fallback when code/git writes are needed. Added tests in src/skills.rs to enforce these constraints across plan_review, implementation_review, and shipment_review. make install-hooks and make sanity passed; pushed commit 04f07a8682fe to origin/main.
